'''Moog Ulur''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] following the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He attended the [[Funeral/Legends|funeral]] of [[Sien Sovv]], where he listened in on a conversation between [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] and members of the [[New Jedi Order]], concerning the growing [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] crisis.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
